channel.title: Playlist on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Playlist on Tech Tracker

item.title: Televizo - now add and watch IPTV / OTT channels on Android easily.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-hyCvZBSf3LU/Y1y96NGj8lI/AAAAAAAAOcI/Hx0-hVJpHdUSLIbQrHovPGrCmOJyajBaQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1667022309686012-0.png" alt=""> TV aka television is an electronic device invented and designed by Philo Taylor Farnsworth was demonstrated in San Francisco on September 7, 1927 then after that as time goes number of inventors and companies for personal or commercial reasons around the world begin building thier own custom TVs at first they used to only play black and white films but later on eventually supported color ones as well.
